message:
fix: capture verify_checksum output to variable for proper error propagation

Process substitution `bash <(verify_checksum ...)` loses the exit
code if checksum verification fails, silently executing an empty
script. Capture to variable first with `|| exit $?` to propagate
failures, then pass via `bash -c` with `</dev/null` for stdin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
